scope.target: Published v0.4.2 trusted registry and backlog truth

Set published_in only after publication succeeds

steps: Create a continuation branch from published main

results.summary: The original finalization was incomplete and recorded false evidence. Workflow 2026-07-20-v0-4-2-release-finalization-hotfix repaired the mutable local records without rewriting Git history or moving the final tag.

results.residual_risk: The public GitHub Release body correction is not a local artifact change and remains assigned to R042-005.
